1.content: Alrighty, welcome to the interactive of your dreams dear reader! Before we begin, from what anime shall you giantesses hail from?
1.title: Start!

11.content: Which one of these wonderful kunoichi is going to be the giantess?
11.title: Naruto

13.content: Alright! Now who will be the focus of this interactive? (Keep in mind that other girls are free to come and go, but this girl will be the center!)
13.title: Bleach

131.content: Okay! Now pick any plot!
131.title: Rukia

1311.content: Now the fun can begin! Quick question, are you a boy, or a girl?
1311.title: Plot 1

choices: I met her in the world of the living
131122.content: Alright Mira! So, how do you know Rukia?
131122.title: Mira

choices: Depends on what I'm feeling (Can control your size)
1311223.content: Truly? Well no time like the present! So tell me, how tall are you?
1311223.title: I don't know her

13112233.content:
Interesting. Well, best start you off then!

You were walking down the quiet streets of your home town. The silence was calm, filled with the jovial tune of your whistled song. As you made your merry way back home, you felt something.
13112233.title: Depends on what I'm feeling (Can control yo...

131122331.content:
Your whistling stops. Something was... wrong. Everything seems quiet, much more so than it just had been a few seconds ago. And what was with this feeling of being watched? You look about your surroundings, and spot a monster.

The creature looks like a giant humanoid, with a white mask in the shape of some strange disfigured face. You scream in horror as the creature comes at you, running full speed. You hardly have time to think!
131122331.title: The silence becomes ominous

1311223312.content: Almost instinctively, you shrink, your height dropping just quickly enough to avoid the open jaws of the monster. Clearly confused, the beast turn around, looking for you as you try to sneak away.
1311223312.title: Shrink down!

13112233121.content:
Suddenly, it catches sight of you. You scream in fear as it loom over you, ready to strike, when suddenly it stops, gasping in shock. Then, just as suddenly, its mask splits in two, and the creature dissipates, leaving behind only a woman in a black kimono with a katana in hand.

She was cute. Her black hair and purple eyes, as well as her graceful pose with sword in hand, you couldn't help but wonder of you were looking at a goddess of swordplay.

She lands on the ground, shaking her blade off before sheathing it.
13112233121.title: It notices you

131122331211.content:
"W-Wow..." you mutter in shock, before gasping and covering your mouth. The woman's eyes widen, and she looks at you in surprise, causing you to flinch.

"What is that?" she says walking closer. You swallow nervously and try to run away, only to be caught as her hand grabs you by the jacket and lifts you up. "A miniature human? And you can see me?"

"I-I'm sorry! I was just walking home and that thing came in out of nowhere, I didn't mean to get in the way!" you manage to sputter out.

"Hmm, I need time to investigate this." Suddenly you find yourself being brought closer to the woman's chest as she opens her kimono up, depositing you in a pocket within the robe, before leaping off.

"H-Hey! Let me out!" you cry as the strange woman begins to run, but your protests are ignored. "Great, kidnapped by some strange lady with a sword who fights monsters. Just what have you gotten yourself into this time Mira?"

Rukia was perplexed, she'd never seen a human like this. I mean sure, she'd heard tale of humans being able to see spirits and hollows, but not soul reapers. Not to mention her size! She was incredibly small, smaller than even an infant! She needed time to investigate this, and so she leaped up onto the roof of a tall building, reaching her lookout spot.

She sighed as she looked over the small city. With the population size of the area, hollows were constantly showing up, so she had to be vigilant. Still though, she had some time before the next one would show, perfect to investigate the strange human she found.

She pulled you out and looked you over. She just couldn't fathom how a human could be so small. Was it some kind of birth defect? A curse? Maybe an illusion? Her finger traced your body, ignoring you protests as she felt you small form. It felt real enough, perhaps this was a real human after all.

"C-Could you stop that?" you cry, catching her attention. She took notice of your intense blush, and shortened breath.

"Hmm, blushing over a girl holding you? You're a pervert aren't you?" Rukia said grinning.

"H-Hey! Don't blame me for getting like this when some strange woman starts touching me all over!" you stammer.

"Oh right, my apologies," Rukia says, setting you in her lap. "What are you? I've never seen a human so small before."

"I'm a regular human girl thank you very much! I just have the ability to alter my size... for some reason..."

"Hmm, doesn't sound very convincing."

"Hey I'm the only known human who can do this so it's not like I have all the answers okay?"

"Well why don't you grow back?"

"Huh?"

"You're in the captivity of a strange woman, a woman you shouldn't be able to perceive I might add, and you haven't grown back yet. How come?"
131122331211.title: "W-Wow..."

1311223312112.content:
"I... I can't," you sigh.

"What? Why not?" Rukia asks.

"Well whenever I change sizes, I have to wait thirty minutes before I can do it again. Since I just did it, I've got about 25 minutes left," you reply.

"I see, so you have limits on this ability of yours. Well you certainly picked an inopportune time to use it."

"I was panicking okay? It was the only thing I could think to do!" you shout up at her before sighing and sitting back down in her lap.

"Well I was supposed to kill that hollow earlier but it got away from me so this is partly my fault. I suppose I can keep you safe until you can change back."

"Oh uh... thanks?"

"You're welcome." Rukia's gaze then turns outwards towards the city, looking over the calm and quiet night. Your gaze follows, and you notice how pretty the view is from up here. Getting comfy, you sit back against her stomach. She looks at you questioningly for a moment, before shrugging and putting and arm over your lap, to make sure you don't fall.

"So uh, who are you anyway?"

"My name is Rukia Kuchiki, and I am a Soul Reaper."

"A soul reaper? You mean like a grim reaper?! Taking people's souls once they die?!"

"Indeed."

"Oh god, if I can see you does that mean I'm dead?!?"

"No it doesn't. It's rare for humans to be able to see spirits, but it happens often enough not to be surprising. Though seeing a soul reaper is a lot more difficult, but again not unheard of. I suppose you're one of those special cases."

"Okay good, I thought you were here to take my soul."

"I don't take souls, I send them to the soul society, a peaceful place where spirits are safe from hollows."

"Huh, so that's what those monsters are?"

"Indeed, Hollows are former spirits that remained in the realm of the living for too long, and became corrupted, turning into monsters that devour souls. By killing them, I cleanse the hollow of its corruption and sin, and send the true soul to the soul society."

"Huh, neat." you then sit in silence, finding yourself enjoying this peaceful time with this beautiful woman. After all, this was probably just a one time thing, so you were taking full advantage of it."
1311223312112.title: "I can't..."

13112233121121.content:
Suddenly, a beeping sound goes off in Rukia's robe, and she reaches into the inner pocket, pulling out something that looked like an old phone. Looking it over, her eyes squint and she sighs.

"Looks like another hollow showed up," Rukia sighed. She then looked down at you, a serious expression on her face. "I'll still keep you with me, but you need to do everything I say alright?"

"Sure thing!" you reply as Rukia picks you up and places you on her shoulder. You hang on tight as she leaps off the building and begins jumping from roof to roof, heading for her prey.

Eventually she finds it, a strange almost crab looking thing, and she pulls out her katana, prepared to fight. The beast roars and charges her, but Rukia dodges it easily, and drives her blade into the beast's head, destroying it.

"Well that was easy," you said.

"Indeed, that hollow must have just formed. A shame I didn't get to the soul within it before it was corrupted." Suddenly you gasp, and Rukia gives you a strange look. "What's up with you?"

"My times up, I can grow back now."

"I see." Rukia takes you from her shoulder and sets you down on the ground. From there, you grown back to full height, which happens to make you only a bit taller than Rukia herself.

"Well uh, thanks for protecting me!" you smile. "See you later I guess?"

"Unlikely," Rukia replied, and without a word more she left, leaping into the night. You watched her go, sad that you might not ever see her again, but content with your little meeting for now.

'No,' you mentally decided. 'I'll see her again, one day."

With that, you headed home.
13112233121121.title: Rukia's communicator beeps

131122331211211.content:
The night after your brief encounter with Rukia, you found yourself walking home alone again. Aware of the dangers of hollows now, you were trying to be cautious, checking every corner before you rounded it, and keeping an ear open for the sounds of a lumbering beast.

As you walked, you passed by an alleyway, where you heard the sound of an injured cat. You animal lover instincts kicking in, you dashed into the alleyway to help the poor kitty. You eventually found it, trapped behind a dumpster with its tail caught under a loose brick. You strain to push the dumpster aside, but you manage, and rescue the poor kitty, freeing its tail, and smiling as you watched it run off. As it did so, the cat stopped and turned to look at you, meowing its thanks, before running off, leaving you with a bright smile.

That's when you heard the breathing.

Turning around, you screamed at the giant hollow that had appeared behind you. This one looked like a praying mantis, with a human skull mask. It roared as one of its giant scythe like arms swung at you.
131122331211211.title: The next night

135.content: Maybe some of these fine ladies?
135.title: Other Choices

14.content:
Okay so which Pokémon is the focus aka
Giantess in this?
14.title: Pokemon

15.content: Some more suggestions are in order?
15.title: Other Options 1

152.content: You're choose to have fun in Highschool dxd universe and have really many desires to be surrounded by the giantess beautiful woman, or at least the woman who had a great breast (Oppai), but the first question is: who are you in this world?
152.title: Highschool DxD

155.content: None of those peeked your interest? Well how about these?
155.title: Other Choices 2

1552.content: Wonderful! Now, who's going to be the main giantess? Or at least the starting one?
1552.title: Dragon Ball

155211.content: And finally! Pick a scenario!
155211.title: Older (DBS)

1552111.content: Alrighty! You are just a regular guy, heading for your new job! Isn't that exciting? You are...
1552111.title: Scenario 1

15521111.content:
An internship at Capsule Corp! You were so excited! After several years of hard work, finally you were getting somewhere in the world! This was the start of your new profitable future.

As you walk make your way to your new employment, you can't help but wonder what you'll do there. Help with experiments? Build new world defining tech? Anything was possible, and it all started here! Who knew what awaited you!
15521111.title: Intern at Capsule Corp

155211111.content:
Suddenly, without warning, a bright flash of light envelops your vision. You cry out in surprise, then quickly lose consciousness. When you wake up, you see the bright blue sky above you.

"Ugh, what happened?" you moan as you try to sit up. Wait, did you pass out? Crap! How long were you asleep? Looking up into the sky, you see the sun still seems to be in the same place thankfully, which meant not much time had passed. Or perhaps an entire day had passed, but that couldn't be right? Someone would have noticed you.

Looking forwards, you spy a woman with blue hair running towards you. Was that Bulma? THE Bulma? You sputter in surprise and stand up, quickly dusting yourself off. You didn't expect to be meeting the boss so soon, but maybe she always comes out to greet the new hires.

But then you notice something strange.

As she gets closer she seems to be getting... bigger? Were your eyes playing tricks on you? Did you have a seizure or something? But as she gets closer, she gets bigger, and bigger, and bigger...

... and bigger.

Soon enough the woman is towering over you, many times your size. You must've been an inch in comparison. What was going on?

"Oh jeez, I hope it didn't hit someone," Bulma says lifting her foot to take a step forward. Unfortunatly, her foot was hovering right over you.
155211111.title: Sudden flash of light

1552111112.content:
"Wait! Please!" you cry out, closing your eyes as her foot gets closer, waiting to be crushed like a bug. But it never comes. Opening you eyes, you see the bottom of her shoe right above you, some small bits of dirt and gravel falling around you. Then, the foot lifts, and you see Bulma staring right at you.

"Oh this is bad," she mutters. You swallow nervously at the sight of the giant woman, not noticing her hand coming down until her fingers wrap around your waist and lift you into the air. You panic, but her grip is firm, and you're helpless to do anything as you're lifted up to her face. "Really bad."

"W-What... how..." you can hardly manage the words.

"Okay little guy, calm down, everything's gonna be okay," Bulma tries to assure.

"O-Okay? OKAY?! WHAT THE HELL HAPPENED TO ME?!?" You cry, partly in panic, partly in rage.

"Well uh, we've been developing a shrink ray, trying to revolutionize cargo transport, and we had a misfire..."

"And that means...?"

"Well the shot kind of flew outside and may or may not have hit you."

"I... what?"

"But don't worry! I'll fix this I promise!"

"Fix this? Well how long is that gonna take?"

"Um... depends?"

"Depends? On what?!"

"However long it takes to make a grow ray."

You were stunned. You were stuck like this. Stuck. Tiny. Your life was over.

"Hey wait, you kind of look familiar..." Bulma says getting a better look at you. "Are you that new intern?"

"Um... yeah?"

"Well uh, at least your first day isn't boring right?" Bulma jokes. But you weren't laughing. You were...
1552111112.title: Don't get stepped on

15521111122.content:
"My... my life is over..." you moan.

"Oh come on kiddo, it's not that bad," Bulma reassures. "Look once we have this fixed I'll promote you to a full time employee."

"R-Really?"

"I mean you were a part of an experiment with brand new technology so as far as I'm concerned you're qualified!"

That did make you feel a little better. Maybe this wouldn't be so bad. After all, how long could it take to fix this?

"Now let's go see-"

"Mrs Bulma!" a voice cries.
15521111122.title: Dejected

155211111222.content:
The call out causes Bulma to flinch in surprise, causing you to fly out of her grip. At first you think you're going to hit the ground, but you quickly realize there's a worse fate in store for you. As she flinches, Bulma cries out in surprise, leaving her mouth wide open for you.

You can hardly process what happens next.

Faster than your bewildered mind can react, you find yourself flying past her lips, over her teeth, and into her gaping maw. You bounce on her tongue, no time to get grip, and it was far too slippery even if you did. All you can do is watch as you fall down into her throat.

And then... swallow.

The loud noise of a "GULP," resounds around you, pushing you even further into confusion and horror. And as the walls of her throat press down around you, you don't even squirm. You don't even scream.

You remain silently helpless as you slide down her throat, past her beating heart, and into her stomach. You enter, silent as you came down.

You land on your face, tumbling over onto your back. You lie there, unmoving, unthinking. What had just happened?
155211111222.title: Bulma flinches in surprise

1552111112223.content:
You were currently... processing? Yeah, processing. Taking in the surroundings, the fact that you got swallowed, all accompanied by the panicking voice of Bulma trying to shoo her assistant away. You sat up. You were in a stomach. Bulma's stomach.

How did this happen again?

Bulma sighed as her coworkers finally left, the excuse of them laser reflecting off a stop sign and shooting off into space seeming to work. She then straightened up and put a hand on her belly. She could feel you in there.

"Hey uh, you alright in there kiddo?" she asked gently.

"I'm... I'm in a stomach," you replied, still not fully grasping the situation.

"Yes, yes you are," she sighed, also not fully grasping it. "Well uh if it's any consolation, you were tasty?"

"Tasty?"

"I mean, I only got a small taste of you but it was pretty good, so I guess you have that," she joked trying to ease the tension. "Look uh, you should be fine in there. The shrink ray ups the target's durability a ton. If you aren't invincible, you're as close as you can get, so you should be fine."

"Fine? Wait you're-"

"Leaving you in there? For now, yes," she sighed. "Look, as weird as it is for me, and believe me it is, to have my new intern in my stomach, you're probably safer in there than almost anywhere else. Besides, I'll be able to keep track of you, and focus on finding out how long it'll take to fix you."

"... right..."

"Yeah, so just sit tight, and I'll let you out in a bit okay?"

"A-Alright," you mutter, still in shock.

"Alright. Now to just get back to work. With a kid in my belly. Oh this is so weird." Bulma then walked back to her lab, an 18 year old kid trapped in her stomach. This was going to be an odd experience.
1552111112223.title: Process

15521111122231.content: Aight you pass out. Now, continue with your perspective.... or?
15521111122231.title: Pass out

155211111222312.content:
It had been... a long day.

Lots of research, designing, testing out a new invention which seemed to hold promise at first but was getting more frustrating with each passing day and failure after failure after failure. And the one time they get the damn thing working, it misfires and then explodes, causing a freak accident.

Speaking of which.

Bulma sighed as she stood in the shower, the warm water running down her back, and couldn't help but put a hand to her belly. The new kid was still in there, sleeping in her stomach. She wasn't looking forward to telling him how long it might take to fix this.

But maybe he'd just stay asleep. Maybe he'd fallen into a coma, which would only be fixed by fixing his new shrunken state, and Bulma would be able to keep him in her belly and wouldn't have to worry until everything was fixed and then she'd fix him and everything would be fine.

'Ugh, if only it were that simple,' she thought to herself. 'Hmmm, well maybe with the dragon balls it could be that simple.'

But she couldn't do that. The kid deserved to know how long he'd be stuck like this. She just hoped his family would understand.

She shut off the water and dried her hair, and hand going to her stomach again.

"Sit tight kiddo, you've got a while before I fix this." Bulma then walked into her room. Vegeta was training with Goku and Whis, and Trunks was on some trip with Goten, leaving her alone. While normally she didn't like this, having less people in this house to get in her way of fixing this fuck up was a blessing in disguise. Speaking of which, she supposed it was time to let him out now.

Focusing, she felt her stomach clench, and a small form travel up her throat. Soon the form entered her mouth, and she spit him out onto her hands.

"Wake up little guy," she whispered nudging you.
155211111222312.title: Bulma's

1552111112223121.content:
You slowly wake, finding yourself in the outside world, out of Bulma's stomach, now in her palm.

"Hey kiddo, you doing alright?" Bulma asked worridely.

"I could be worse I guess," you reply sitting up. "Suppose I'm lucky that someone's working to fix this."

"About that... fixing this is gonna take a while..."

"How long?"

"I'm... not sure," Bulma admitted. "The only way we can fix you is by making a growth ray... but the only way we can make that is by perfecting the shrink ray first... which blew up... and is gonna take a few weeks to fix."

"Right..."

"Hey but don't worry! I'll send a paycheck to you and your family till this gets fixed! It is our fault after all."

"Well um... that might be a problem..."

"How so?" Bulma questioned. She didn't need another thing added to this mess.

"Well uh, I don't really have a family."

Oh.

"I've been on my own for... a while now, living in a shitty apartment I could hardly afford. Hell, part of the reason I applied to this job, aside from wanting to enter the field of science, was the free dorms provided to employees who applied."

"Oh... and I'm guessing you were one of them."

"Yep."

"And you got approved?"

"Yep."

"So you don't have anywhere to go back to."

"Not really no."

"Well... this just got more complicated," Bulma sighed. Great, the kid was homeless, this was going to be even more stressful.

Or, maybe this was another blessing in disguise?

After all, if the kid had nowhere to go, he could certainly stay here, it's not like Bulma didn't have the room. Plus, that meant she'd be able to keep an eye on him, and perhaps run some tests to see if she could grow him back faster.

"Hmmm, actually that might work."

"What might work?" the tiny in her hands asked.

"Well, if you don't have anywhere to go, how about sticking around here?"

"Like, living here? You'd let me?"

"Of course I would, I'm not just gonna kick you out!" she smiled. "Besides, all of this is my fault, so I kind of owe you whatever help you need."

"A-Are you sure? I don't wanna impose-"

"It's fine! Besides, with my husband out, my kid on a trip, and my parents on vacation, it's just me around here so I'd kind of appreciate the company."

"Well then, I guess I can't refuse!" the kid said looking a bit happier. That was good.

"Say kid, I never got your name."

"Oh, it's Shiro."

"Well Shiro, I guess you and I are gonna be spending a lot of time together!" Bulma laughed.
1552111112223121.title: Wake up

15521111122231211.content:
"Welp, it's getting late and it's been a long day, I think we should head to bed," Bulma said walking into her room.

"R-Right," you replied.

"Hmm, now comes the first problem of having you stay here."

"And that is?"

"Where do you sleep?" Bulma chuckled. "I'm assuming you don't want to sleep on the ground?"

"N-No..."

"Right, but we don't have a little bed made for you. What to do..."
15521111122231211.title: Head to bed

155212.content:
Someone’s forgetting options

Which era of Bulma?
155212.title: Younger (DBZ)

1552123.content:
My stupid touch screen on my
tablet screwed up let’s try again

Which of these versions of Bulma gets big?
Or maybe move into another
OG Original Dragon Ball ( NOT Z )
Character
1552123.title: OG DB Aja

1552211.content: Alrighty now, you a guy or a girl?
1552211.title: Scenario 1

15522111.content:
Your eyes opened to an interior ceiling. It was white, with a few light imbedded in it, turned off as the light of the sun filtered in. Where... where were you?

You couldn't remember how you got here. Hell, you couldn't remember anything. That was certainly odd.

You noticed that you were laying on something soft. Sitting up you looked around and saw giant noodles.

"What?" you muttered to yourself. You then saw a giant pair of chopsticks come down and pluck a few noodles into their grasp and lift them into the air. "What?"

The noodles rose up to the face of a giant woman with black hair. You didn't recognize her, and she didn't seem to be paying attention as she ate, her mind on something else as she brought in the noddle and chewed, then swallowed. Then those chopsticks came back down towards you.
15522111.title: Guy

155221113.content:
You were too shocked to move. You couldn't squirm or speak as the chopsticks grabbed you and lifted you up with some noodles and meat. The woman didn't see you as she opened her mouth, and pushed you in.

You finally broke out of your stupor as the lips behind you closed, and the teeth began to chew. You panicked as you began to get thrown about, struggling to avoid the gnashing teeth of the giantess, and held tightly onto the tongue as it wiggled and squirmed, and a moan of satisfaction escaped from behind you. Suddenly, everything tilted back, and you were swallowed.

You had been consumed. And you couldn't help but settle with that fact as you slid down into the woman's belly.

"Mmmm, what was that? Did they change the type of chicken at the market place?" the woman wondered aloud. You realize that was probably you she was talking about. You quickly passed out from shock.
155221113.title: Too shocked to move

1552211132.content:
Chi Chi had to say, that bowl of noodles had been particularly delicious! What had she put in there? She'd kind of been on auto pilot all day, worried sick about Goku and Gohan after they went off for their latest training session. She didn't remember buying anything different at the store, but maybe she had? She'd have to investigate later. For now, there were chores to do!

Chi Chi spent the rest of the day cleaning, doing laundry, anything to make the house spotless for when her husband and son came back. It had to be, so Gohan could focus on his studies. As she did, her mind kept drifting back to her lunch, wanting more of it. Had Goku left an impression on her or something? She couldn't get it out of her head.

After everything was clean and put away, Chi Chi had herself a bath, her mind still on the noodles she ate, wondering if she had anything left over that she could make into dinner to get that taste again. Then she felt something in her stomach.
1552211132.title: Chi Chi's perspective now

15522111322.content:
"H-Hello?" a voice muttered. Chi Chi looked around in panic, fearing someone had broke in, but she didn't see anyone. "M-Miss?"

Wait, was that voice... coming from inside her?

Chi Chi looked down, straight at her belly, where she swore she heard the voice coming from.

"H-Hello?" The voice piped up again, right from her stomach. Someone was in her stomach? SOMEONE WAS IN HER STOMACH?!

"H-Hello?" Chi chi replied back.

"Oh! You can hear me! Um... could you let me out now?" Let him out? Oh kami she should let him out!

"O-Of course!" Chi Chi cried, closing her eyes and focusing. Her stomach clenched, and she felt something travel up her throat, until she spat you out into her hands.

You tumbled out of the woman's mouth and into her hands, the sudden bright light blinding you, causing you to shake your head to get your bearings. Soon your vision cleared, and you spied the giant face of the woman who ate you.

"Oh... oh my... did I...?"

"E-Eat me? Y-Yes," you admitted shyly.

"W-When? How? I don't-"

"I was in your lunch... I think." The woman's eyes widen in surprise. She seemed to know what you were talking about.

"So that sudden burst of taste... was you?"

"I guess?" You didn't like hearing that you tasted good. It was then you noticed that the woman's hair was down and wet. Looking around, you saw she was in the bath.

She was in the bath. With you. Naked. In the bath. With you.

You tried not to pay attention to this.

"Oh god, a-are you alright? I didn't hurt you did I?"

"Um, no," you replied. "I seem to be fine."

"Oh good," she sighed in relief. "Um, so why were you in my lunch?"

"I don't know. I don't remember anything past waking up in your lunch, and then getting eaten."

"I see. Well that's certainly an issue. So uh, what's your name?"

"I..."
15522111322.title: It's you!

155221113222.content:
"I... I don't know," you admit sadly. "I don't really remember anything."

"Not a thing?"

"Well, I'm pretty sure I'm 18... I think."

"Oh honey," Chi Chi cries hugging you to her cheek. "Oh you poor little thing, waking up without a clue to who you are and then suddenly getting eaten, that must have been so stressful!"

"Well it was at first," you replied. "I was scared, so much that I passed out. But when I woke up, I was fine. It wasn't actually that bad in there, it was warm and comfy. But I didn't think it was a good idea to stay longer than necessary."

"If only I had seen you in there, I never would have... y'know."

"T-Thanks, but what's done is done. I'm just glad I'm being seen now."

"Well I'm glad to little... hmm well what should I call you?"
155221113222.title: "I don't know,"

1552211132222.content:
"I know! How about Gomen?"

"Uh sure, but I don't know how useful that's gonna be."

"What do you mean?"

"Well I mean after I leave I-"

"Leave? What are you talking about young man? You're staying right here!"

"I-I am?"

"Of course! I could never let a little thing like you go out there on his own! It's far too dangerous!"

"O-Oh, well thanks."

"You're welcome. Now strip!"
1552211132222.title: Chi Chi names you

15522111322221.content:
"W-What?" you cry in surprise.

"Well after being in my stomach so long you're a mess! You need a bath mister."

"W-Wait but you're-"

"Oh it's fine. I used to bathe with my son all the time! This isn't that different."

You weren't sure how you should take that sentiment but did as she said anyways, taking off your clothes and handing them to her. She set them aside for now and began to wash up.

The bath wasn't long, Chi Chi didn't waste time cleaning you and herself up. Once clean, she got out, carrying you carefully as she dried you both off. Soon enough, you found yourself sharing dinner with the woman, and after that, bed.

"Now, where should you sleep?" Chi Chi wondered as she held you level with her chest. "Well I don't have a bed or anything for you, so I guess you'll have to sleep with me."
15522111322221.title: W-What?

155221113222211.content:
"Hmm, well I guess this will do," Chi Chi said getting into bed and laying you on her chest. Her boob was warm and soft, and as she pulled up the covers, you found yourself especially comfy. "Comfy?"

"Y-Yes miss," you nodded.

"Oh I guess I never said my name. I'm Chi Chi."

"T-Thanks Miss Chi Chi."

"You're welcome Gomen." And with that, the two of you fell asleep.
155221113222211.title: Sleep on Chi Chi

choices: She stuffs you in a pocket
She stuffs you in her shirt
She tosses you into her mouth
1552211132222112.content:
Time passed, and your relationship with Chi Chi and her family grew, all the way until you were considered a part of the family. Chi Chi even had you start calling her mom. And on this day, so many days after the day she found you, you yourself were chilling on the dinning room table, eating lunch with Gohan.

"Hey Mom?" Gohan called.

"What is it?" Chi Chi asked walking in.

"Dad wants me to train with him after lunch."

"Absolutely not! You have studying to do!"

"Aw come on Mom I've been studying all day!" Gohan whined. "I got my homework done early! Please?"

Chi Chi stared at him for a moment, trying to find a reason to say no, but nothing was coming to her.

"Ugh, fine, but you be back by dinner!"

"Can I come?" You asked.

"No you cannot Gomen! I know for certain you haven't finished your homework!"

"But Mom!"

"No! You will stay and study!"

"What's the point of me even studying? Not like I can ever get a job."

"What was that?" Chi Chi asked turning to you.

"N-Nothing!"

"That's what I thought," she replied getting back to cleaning off the dishes.

"Sorry you can't come Gomen," Gohan whispered.

"Don't worry, I'll just sneak out," you chuckled. Gohan laughed as well, until he looked behind you and his eyes widened.

"Uh, well I gotta go bye!" he said running out the door. Why did he seem so terrified. That's when you noticed an ominous feeling behind you. Slowly, you turned around, coming face to face with your mother's glare.

"Sneak out huh?" she said flatly.

"Y-You heard that?"

"Yes, I did. And do you know why you won't be sneaking out?" You were so terrified you didn't notice she had grabbed you till you were up in the air in front of her face.

"W-Why?" you asked. Why did you ask?

"Because I said so!" she angrily replied.
1552211132222112.title: To the future!

15522111322221123.content:
Without a hint of hesitation, Chi Chi tossed you into her mouth, and without barely tasting you, she swallowed you down, sending you into her stomach.

As you slid down, you thought about your strange predicament. You were pretty sure mothers didn't normally eat their children.

Still though considering your size, and the fact that you weren't in any danger, Chi Chi had long decided that her stomach was a good place to keep you safe. In there, Chi Chi could keep an eye on you and could protect you from anything that might try and hurt you so this wasn't the first time she had done this. You were used to it by this point.

You landed in her stomach without much fuss, and sighed as you popped a squat against her stomach lining. You could feel her hand rubbing her belly behind you.

"There, now when I'm done with the dishes I'll swallow your books and you can get to studying. Bulma was kind enough to try and find some way you could help at Capsule Corp, so you're gonna study until you're the smartest person there, got it?"

"Yes Mom," you replied.

"Good," Chi Chi said and went back to the dishes.
15522111322221123.title: She tosses you into her mouth

choices: Ask Chi Chi to eat you
155221113222211231.content:
Eventually Chi Chi spat you back out again to have dinner. She made noodles, the same kind as she did on the day you first met. She set out a bowl for herself and a smaller one for you.

"Here Gomen, eat up!"

"Thanks Mom," you replied taking the bowl and eating straight away. You were quick to finish your meal, and merely sat patiently as Chi Chi ate hers. Then you got an idea.
155221113222211231.title: At Dinner

1552211132222112312.content:
"Hey Mom?" you ask.

"What is it sweetie?" Chi Chi replies warmly.

"Can you uh... eat me again?"

"Eat you... with my dinner?" Chi Chi was slightly caught off guard. Yes she'd eaten you plenty of times already, her stomach was her favorite way of keeping you safe after all, and you sometimes slept in there, but eating you with food? This felt a little different.

"Well yeah, I mean you did the first time," you shyly joke.

"Gomen honey that was an accident-"

"I know, but you've eaten me a lot ever since then, and it's kind of fun. So I thought this might be fun too."

Chi Chi sits in thought. He did have a point, she did it so often, why would this time be any different. But it just felt different than the other times. Was it maybe because she'd secretly fallen in love with your taste, which only helped in her excuse to eat you again and again? She'd never truly tasted you, just a hint before you go down. This time would be an opportunity to experience it fully.
1552211132222112312.title: Ask Chi Chi to eat you

choices: She goes for you straight away
15522111322221123121.content:
Chi Chi is about to refuse, but she stops short when she notices your look. Your cute little face, your pleading little eyes. She buckled.

"Oh, I can't say no to that face!" she lamented before smiling. "Oh alright Gomen, get in."

You gasp in pleasant surprise before running over to her bowl and grabbing the edge, finding it difficult to lift yourself up. Chi Chi giggles at this and uses her chopsticks to help you up, causing you to tumble into her food. You smile up at your adoptive mother, ready for it.
15522111322221123121.title: She accepts

155221113222211231212.content:
Chi Chi grabs a few noodles in front of you, lifting them up to her face and into her mouth. She brings them in and slowly begins to chew, smiling down at you. She gently pets you as she chews, before swallowing it down, unintentionally giving you a show of how it'd go down.

"Alright my little Gomen, come here~" Chi Chi cooed using her chopsticks to wrap you up with a few noodles before pinning them in your sides. She lifts you up to her face, smiling but a slight hint of worry in her eyes. "You sure you wanna do this honey? It won't be scary for you or anything?"

"I'll be fine Mom, it'll be fun!"

"Okay, just making sure. Now come here." She opens her mouth wide and slowly brings you close. Her warm breath washes over you as you peer into her mouth, staring at t her tongue, leading to her throat, which looks more inviting than ever. You squirm in slight excitement.

You pass over her lips and teeth, and she gently sets you on her tongue. Using the tip of the red organ, Chi Chi unravels you form your noodle bind and tosses the food into her teeth, beginning to chew. She uses her tongue to keep you steady, away from her gnashing molars, but also to taste you. And you, taste, wonderful.

Chi Chi moans in surprise at just how delicious you are. You go so perfectly with the noodles and sauce, it was unbelievable! Not to mention the adorable feeling of your squirming about in her mouth, adding a whole new dimension to the meal she didn't think was possible. Why hadn't she done this sooner? Well whatever the reason, she was definitely going to do this again.
155221113222211231212.title: Eats around you first

1552211132222112312122.content:
Chi Chi can't take it anymore, and she tilts her head back. You slide down into her throat with chewed up bits of food and she swallows, sending you down. She sighs as she feels you enter her body, feeling it more than ever before. It felt, so, good.

You felt much the same, this experience somehow being different than the others. You weren't sure why, but you loved it this time, more than ever. And as you entered her stomach, you couldn't help but smile.

"Mmmm, I rather enjoyed that my little Gomen," Chi Chi cooed rubbing her belly. "We're definitely going to have to do that more often."

"Y-Yeah!" you agree getting comfy.
1552211132222112312122.title: Swallow

1553.content: You still need more options? Fine, how about these?
1553.title: Other Choices 3

15533.content: Christ how many options do you need? Fine, here are some more/
15533.title: Other Choices 4

15533312.content: First, how should she grow?
15533312.title: Serenity Wheeler

choices: Personified giantess countries here we come!
1553332.content: What about Hetalia: Axis Powers? Nobody's added it yet.
1553332.title: Something else

choices: Minor-they don't get enough time to be in the spotlight!
15533321.content: Okay then, shall we focus on the minor characters, or the major characters? The choice is yours.
15533321.title: Personified giantess countries here we come!

choices: Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, or Oceania
155333211.content: Okay-do we focus on Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, or Oceania? Or just a mystery?
155333211.title: Minor-they don't get enough time to be in t...

1553332112.content: Okay then. You've chosen mystery. The next chapter is just going to say 'Onwards' as the title.
1553332112.title: Mystery

15533321121.content:
Canada moaned as she rolled over in her sleep, then her violet-indigo eyes opened in pain as she gasped, curling up into a ball. Her bones began to creak as they began to change.
Canada gasped as her body began to change painfully, her normally unheard yells of pain becoming louder and louder as the level of the pain increased. Then, finally, mercifully, she fell unconscious. What happened?
15533321121.title: Onwards

155333211211.content:
When Canada woke up, her vision was obscured by something...something red. Then she realized what it was, and the Canadian female blushed so deeply one would have sworn she was a red traffic light. It was her panties, which were laying on top of her. The busty Canadian had shrunk down, but she couldn't tell to what height.
She shrieked as there was a loud bang, and her world violently shook up and down. She could only pray it was someone kind and merciful. A voice said, "What happened?" And as she turned, she realized who it was.
155333211211.title: She shrunk!

1553332112111.content:
Ukraine looked down at her red panties, and she felt her breathe hitching as the giant, busty Ukrainian woman reached down. Canada had to find a way to alert her to the situation before long, or even before the Ukrainian decided to put the red panties on, sending her into the womb...wait, where did that thought come from?
More importantly, why was Ukraine here? Coincidence, or simply because she was looking for her?
1553332112111.title: Ukraine

15533321121112.content:
"I was looking for Canada," Ukraine murmured. "And I think I know where she is." Canada's heart rose as Ukraine swiftly yanked on the red panties, revealing her.

"I don't know what happened!" She shouted, waving her arms in the air as Katyusha looked at her in disbelief. "I woke up like this!" Ukraine nodded, and picked up the shrunken Canadian female.

"You're so cute," Ukraine muttered. There was something in her aqua blue eyes that Madeleine couldn't make out. What was it?
15533321121112.title: Looking

155333211211121.content:
There was a low, but audible growl emanating from Ukraine, and both realized it was hunger. Canada was already in Ukraine's hand, and she fearfully looked up at the Ukrainian giantess. Without a second thought, Ukraine began to speak. "Don't worry Maddie, I won't digest you." With that said, she raised the equally busty Canadian woman above her head, high above her open maw, and dropped Madeleine in.
Katyusha rolled her friend-turned-prey around in her mouth, enjoying the flavour and the squirming Canada was giving her, albeit unwillingly. She moaned as the last of her crush's flavour drained away, and she swallowed, tracing the Canadian's path into her groaning and gurgling belly with a hand, sighing as the other woman arrived in her gut. "Hey! Let me out!" She heard her friend yell, although it was muffled by both the moaning organ and the thick, slimy walls of flesh.
"I already told you," Ukraine said, her voice light, "I'm not going to digest you." Katyusha smiled as she felt her crush's squirms fade away after a moment, and as Madeleine sat down on the fleshy floor of her gut.
Ukraine sighed, and, since her stomach was now apparently full, fell asleep quickly, one hand on her belly as she took off her clothes in her sleep.
155333211211121.title: Hunger

1553332112111211.content: Ukraine blinked awake, her stomach having settled down from Canada's furious squirming the previous day. She breathed in and out, sighing happily at her full stomach. "I wonder who else I'll eat," the Ukrainian female thought aloud, giggling as she rubbed her stomach.
1553332112111211.title: Following day

15533322.content: Here is another two choices.
15533322.title: More choices of course

155333223.content: How about a crazy high school?
155333223.title: More choices

info.brief_description: Ever wanted to have some fun with giant anime girls? This is the place to be!
info.description:
Ever wanted to have some fun with giant anime girls? This is the place to be! Warning, +18 stuff will be allowed in this interactive, so watch out for your innocence!

Things allowed include:
Vore,
Digestion (You must be reborn afterwards)
Unbirth,
Futa,
Lactation,
Butt,
Breasts,
Feet,
+18

Not allowed:
Death,
Scat,
Farts,

I will be removing chapter that have bad grammer, or are only one sentence unless the chapter is simply serving the purpose of offering more routes for other people to take, so please be aware!
